tasks.title: Add entity_comments Drizzle schema + migration + trigger registration
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/entity-comment/entity_comment.dbschema.ts following the user_bookmark.dbschema.ts polymorphic FK pattern. Columns: id (uuid PK), entity_type (EntityTypePgEnum NOT NULL), entity_id (uuid NOT NULL), author_id (uuid NOT NULL FK→users SET NULL), content (text NOT NULL), moderation_state (ModerationStatusPgEnum NOT NULL DEFAULT 'APPROVED'), created_at, updated_at, created_by_id, updated_by_id, deleted_at, deleted_by_id. Add compound index on (entity_id, entity_type, deleted_at) matching idx_user_bookmarks_entity_active pattern. Register the table in packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh so the set_updated_at trigger is applied after every schema push. Run pnpm db:generate to produce the migration file. Key files: packages/db/src/schemas/entity-comment/entity_comment.dbschema.ts, packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts (re-export), packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh. Acceptance: AC-1 (columns + index), AC-2 (DEFAULT APPROVED verified via migration inspect).

subtasks.title: Create entity_comment.dbschema.ts with all columns + index
Re-export from packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts
Register set_updated_at trigger in apply-postgres-extras.sh
Run pnpm db:generate and verify migration file

tasks.notes: Schema applied via db:push --force + db:apply-extras (project dev workflow; db:generate intentionally NOT run since src/migrations/ starts empty and would emit a full-monorepo migration). set_updated_at trigger attaches automatically via the dynamic loop in 0005_set_updated_at_trigger.sql (no script edit needed). author_id resolved to NULLABLE + ON DELETE SET NULL (RD-5 vs R6 conflict; enforced registered-users at service layer). AC-1 + AC-2 verified in DB (12 cols, idx_entity_comments_entity_active, DEFAULT APPROVED, trigger trg_set_updated_at_entity_comments).

In the EVENT section (near line 188 where EVENT_COMMENT_CREATE lives), add EVENT_COMMENT_VIEW = 'event.comment.view' and EVENT_COMMENT_MODERATE = 'event.comment.moderate'. Do NOT add _WRITE variants (RD-9). Also add POST_COMMENT = 'POST_COMMENT' and EVENT_COMMENT = 'EVENT_COMMENT' to PermissionCategoryEnum. Verify POST_COMMENT_CREATE and EVENT_COMMENT_CREATE remain unmodified. Key file: packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts. tasks.notes: Created entities/entityComment/ (camelCase dir to match schemas-package convention; task said entity-comment but db uses kebab / schemas uses camelCase). Files: entityComment.schema (EntityCommentSchema + CommentContentSchema 1-2000), .crud (CreateEntityCommentInput {entityType,entityId,content} strict; ModerateEntityCommentInput {moderationState: APPROVED|REJECTED} only — publish-immediately, no PENDING via API), .query (PublicCommentThreadQuery pageSize def20/max50; RecentCommentsQuery pageSize def10/max50), .admin-search (extends AdminSearchBaseSchema + entityType/moderationState/entityId/authorId; inherits unused lifecycle 'status' harmlessly), .http (public DTO {id,authorName,content,createdAt} no moderationState/no raw authorId; admin item full+authorName; recent item; path params; bodies), .access (Public/Admin field-visibility). Added EntityCommentIdSchema to common/id.schema.ts. authorId nullable in base (SET NULL resolution). Verified: schemas typecheck 0 errors, full suite 3838/3838, new tests 12/12, biome clean. NO content-update input (comments not editable in MVP).

tasks.title: Implement EntityCommentService — create + soft-delete-own + counter sync
tasks.description: Create packages/service-core/src/services/entity-comment.service.ts extending BaseCrudService. Implement in this task: (1) create(): validate entityType is in ALLOWED_ENTITY_TYPES ['POST', 'EVENT'] (return INVALID_ENTITY_TYPE error otherwise — AC-3), set moderationState=APPROVED, set authorId from actor; if entityType=POST atomically increment posts.comments counter. (2) softDeleteOwn(): validate actor is the comment author (return 403-equivalent error if not — AC-16); soft-delete; if entityType=POST and comment was APPROVED decrement posts.comments counter. (3) countApprovedByPostId(): recompute counter via COUNT (used for reconciliation). Use runWithLoggingAndValidation() and Result<T>. Unit tests (Vitest) covering: create happy path (POST counter incremented, AC-11 baseline), create invalid entity type (AC-3), create event (no counter change, AC-26), softDeleteOwn as author (AC-15), softDeleteOwn as non-author (AC-16), content too long returns error (AC-13 at service layer). Key files: packages/service-core/src/services/entity-comment.service.ts, packages/service-core/src/services/index.ts, packages/service-core/test/entity-comment-create.test.ts. Acceptance: AC-3, AC-11 (partial), AC-13 (service), AC-15, AC-16, AC-26 (no event counter); ≥90% branch coverage target (AC-36).

subtasks.title: Scaffold EntityCommentService extending BaseCrudService
Implement create() with entityType allowlist + counter sync for POST
Implement softDeleteOwn() with author check + counter decrement
Implement countApprovedByPostId() recompute helper
Unit tests: create, invalid entityType, no event counter, softDeleteOwn auth

tasks.title: Implement EntityCommentService — list, getById, moderate, hardDelete, restore
tasks.description: Continue packages/service-core/src/services/entity-comment.service.ts adding: (4) listPublic({ entityId, entityType, page, pageSize }): returns APPROVED + non-deleted only, sorted createdAt ASC, returns 404 if entity not found or not published (delegate entity lookup to PostModel/EventModel). (5) listAdmin({ filters }): full list with all moderationState values, supports filters from T-005 admin-search schema. (6) getById(id): resolves entityType to check appropriate VIEW permission. (7) moderate({ id, moderationState, actor }): update moderationState; if entityType=POST recompute posts.comments counter (add 1 for REJECTED→APPROVED, subtract 1 for APPROVED→REJECTED). (8) hardDelete(id): permanent removal; recompute counter if applicable. (9) restore(id): clear deletedAt + deletedById; if entityType=POST and comment was APPROVED increment counter. Unit tests for moderate (AC-19, AC-20, AC-25 counter scenarios), hardDelete (AC-22), restore (AC-23), and counter integrity (AC-24). Key files: packages/service-core/src/services/entity-comment.service.ts (cont.), packages/service-core/test/entity-comment-admin.test.ts. Acceptance: AC-19, AC-20, AC-22, AC-23, AC-24, AC-25; ≥90% branch coverage (AC-36).

subtasks.title: Implement listPublic() with APPROVED filter + entity existence check
Implement listAdmin() with full filter support
Implement getById() with permission resolution by entityType
Implement moderate() with counter sync (APPROVED↔REJECTED)
Implement hardDelete() and restore() with counter adjustments
Unit tests: moderate counter scenarios, hardDelete, restore (AC-19/20/22/23/24/25)

tasks.title: Public API endpoints — GET comments for post and event
tasks.description: Add two public routes in apps/api/src/routes/public/: GET /api/v1/public/posts/:postId/comments and GET /api/v1/public/events/:eventId/comments. Use createSimpleRoute or createListRoute factory. No auth middleware. Call EntityCommentService.listPublic(). Return paginated list with response shape {id, authorName, content, createdAt} (no moderationState exposed — AC-8). Map null authorId to '[Usuario eliminado]' display name. Return 404 if entity not found or unpublished (AC-9). Query params: page (default 1), pageSize (default 20, max 50). Sort: createdAt ASC. Register routes in the public router. Key files: apps/api/src/routes/public/posts-comments.route.ts, apps/api/src/routes/public/events-comments.route.ts, apps/api/src/routes/public/index.ts. Acceptance: AC-8, AC-9, AC-10 (empty array for zero comments).

tasks.title: Protected API endpoints — POST comments + DELETE own comment
tasks.description: Add three protected routes in apps/api/src/routes/protected/: POST /api/v1/protected/posts/:postId/comments (requires POST_COMMENT_CREATE; rate-limited 5/min via createPerRouteRateLimitMiddleware from apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts; body validated by CreateEntityCommentInput Zod schema; calls EntityCommentService.create(); returns 201 with created comment; returns 422 for content >2000 chars), POST /api/v1/protected/events/:eventId/comments (same contract, EVENT_COMMENT_CREATE gate, no counter update), DELETE /api/v1/protected/comments/:commentId (requires valid session; calls EntityCommentService.softDeleteOwn(); returns 204 on success, 403 if not author, 404 if not found; decrements counter if applicable). All three require a valid Better Auth session (existing session middleware). Register routes in protected router. Key files: apps/api/src/routes/protected/posts-comments.route.ts, apps/api/src/routes/protected/events-comments.route.ts, apps/api/src/routes/protected/comments-delete.route.ts, apps/api/src/routes/protected/index.ts. Acceptance: AC-11, AC-12, AC-13, AC-14, AC-15, AC-16.

tasks.title: Web comment thread component (Astro + React island) for post detail page
tasks.description: Create the comment thread infrastructure for the post detail page (apps/web/src/pages/blog/[slug].astro or equivalent). Work: (1) CommentThread.astro — static container that renders the thread section below post content; fetches initial comments via SSR from GET /api/v1/public/posts/:postId/comments; shows skeleton placeholder while loading. (2) CommentList.tsx (React island, client:visible) — renders APPROVED comments sorted oldest-first with optimistic update after submit; shows empty state ('Sé el primero en comentar') when zero comments (AC-30 equivalent for posts). (3) CommentSubmitForm.tsx (React island, client:visible) — authenticated users see submit form; guests see login CTA (AC-29); on submit calls POST /protected/posts/:postId/comments; inline error on network failure (form content preserved); rate-limit 429 shows 'Demasiados comentarios' message (AC-28). Styling: CSS Modules (*.module.css). i18n: all strings via comments.* keys from T-013. Key files: apps/web/src/components/comments/CommentThread.astro, CommentList.tsx, CommentList.module.css, CommentSubmitForm.tsx, CommentSubmitForm.module.css. Acceptance: AC-27, AC-28, AC-29.

tasks.title: Admin comment detail page (/admin/comments/:id)
tasks.description: Create the comment detail route at apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/comments/$commentId.tsx. Page sections: (1) full comment content display (no truncation), (2) author info panel (name, link to /admin/users/:id), (3) entity panel (type badge, link to the post or event), (4) metadata: moderationState badge, createdAt, updatedAt (lightweight moderation history using updatedAt + updatedById — no separate audit table in MVP). Action buttons: Approve (PATCH moderation), Reject (PATCH moderation), Soft-delete (DELETE), Restore (POST restore — only visible if deletedAt is set), Hard-delete (DELETE .../hard — with confirmation dialog). beforeLoad guard: requires POST_COMMENT_VIEW or EVENT_COMMENT_VIEW (resolved from stored entityType; use a shared permission helper). TanStack Query for data fetch (useQuery on GET /admin/comments/:id) and mutations. Shadcn UI (Card, Button, Badge, Dialog, Separator). Tailwind CSS v4. i18n strings from comments.* namespace. Key files: apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/comments/$commentId.tsx, apps/admin/src/components/comments/CommentDetailPanel.tsx. Acceptance: full display of AC-17 response fields, all moderation actions available inline.
